name: FiEE, Inc.
business: FiEE, Inc. is a digital service provider integrating AI and data analytics into content creation, digital authentication, and brand management, offering digital content/MCN services, software development, and digital authentication services. Its customers include individuals and entities seeking to grow their online presence, software development, or digital authentication services, with substantially all revenue from outside the U.S.
sellsTo: individuals and entities seeking online presence
corporate and individual clients for digital authentication

exposures.sentence: We are currently transforming our operations as a digital service provider focused on integrating artificial intelligence ( AI ) and data analytics into content creation, digital authentication, and brand management.
Through the acquisition of HGK, we have successfully applied blockchain technology to our digital authentication services.
This transition represents a strategic pivot toward high-growth, emerging technology sectors, including AI, blockchain, and the Multi-Channel Network ( MCN ) ecosystem.
In addition, we have four patent applications under temporary protection in Hong Kong, primarily focused on edge computing, ERP systems, and AI content tracing.

catalysts.event: Completed acquisition of Houren-Geiju Kabushikikaisha (HGK) for $3.5 million
catalysts.sentence: On November 30, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Houren-Geiju Kabushikikaisha ( HGK ), a Japanese technology company specializing in digital authentication services for art collections.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of assets from Suzhou Yixuntong Network Technology Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: Following a non-binding letter of intent signed on March 25, 2025, the Company's subsidiary, FiEE (HK) Limited, entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement on June 30, 2025, with Hongyan Sun, Lin Lin, and Yixuntong.

catalysts.event: Formal launch of customized software services
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we formally launched customized software services.

catalysts.event: Entered into Purchase Agreement with Helena for up to $15 million of Common Stock over 36 months
catalysts.sentence: On May 9, 2025, we entered into a Purchase Agreement with Helena Global Investment Opportunities I Ltd. ( Helena ). The Company has the right to sell to Helena up to $15,000,000 of Common Stock over a 36-month period ending in May 2028.

catalysts.event: January 2026 private placement expected to close at end of Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: On January 30, 2026, the Company entered into a Securities Purchase Agreement with certain investors to issue an aggregate of 394,476 shares of Common Stock at $5.07 per share for gross proceeds of approximately $2 million. The transaction is expected to close at the end of the first quarter of 2026.
